title: ASHLEIGH & BURWOOD Fresh Linen Scented Home Reed Diffuser - 50ml
features: Effortless Home Fragrance: Enjoy a flameless, fuss-free way to scent your home. The Scented Home Reed Diffuser continuously releases fragrance for up to 4 weeks.
Elegant Design: Comes in a stylish recyclable glass vessel that complements any room — perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and bathrooms.
Natural Fragrance Release: Includes 6 natural reeds designed for optimal scent diffusion, filling your space evenly with a long-lasting aroma.
Made in the UK: Crafted with care and expertise using high-quality, naturally inspired ingredients for a safe and soothing home experience.
Eco-Friendly Choice: Both the glass bottle and packaging are fully recyclable — a sustainable, conscious choice for fragrance lovers.
description: Product description Ashleigh & Burwood The Scented Home Reed Diffuser – 50ml Transform your home into a calming sanctuary with Ashleigh & Burwood The Scented Home Reed Diffuser , a flameless, fuss-free diffuser that continuously releases natural fragrance for up to 4 weeks. Perfect for busy parents and anyone who loves a cozy, inviting home. Key Benefits: Long-Lasting Home Fragrance: Each 50ml diffuser provides up to 4 weeks of continuous, gentle scent. Keep your living room, bedroom, or bathroom smelling fresh without the hassle of candles. Natural & Safe Ingredients: Made from high-quality natural ingredients and infused into a recyclable glass vessel, this diffuser is safe for your home and family. Effortless & Flameless: Simply insert the 6 natural reeds, and let the fragrance diffuse naturally. No flame, no fuss — ideal for homes with kids and pets. Stylish & Sustainable: The sleek, recyclable glass vessel fits seamlessly into any décor while supporting eco-conscious living. Made in the UK: Carefully crafted in the UK to ensure premium quality and a luxurious fragrance experience. How to Use: Remove the diffuser cap. Insert the 6 natural reeds into the 50ml glass vessel. Flip the reeds occasionally to refresh the fragrance. Enjoy up to 4 weeks of long-lasting home aroma. Why Choose Ashleigh & Burwood? Ashleigh & Burwood are renowned for premium home fragrance products made with care and attention to detail. The Scented Home Reed Diffuser combines quality, style, and sustainability for an effortless way to elevate any space.
